mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, l.name AS level_name, u.real_name AS owner_name, di.item_value AS source_channel_name FROM crm_customer c LEFT JOIN crm_customer_level l ON c.level_id = l.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.owner_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_dict_item di ON di.type_code = 'lead_source' AND di.item_code = c.source_channel AND di.deleted_at IS NULL
c.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (c.name LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%' OR c.phone LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%' OR c.company LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%')
AND c.level_id = #{levelId} AND c.owner_id = #{ownerId} AND c.source_channel = #{sourceChannel} AND c.province = #{province} AND c.city = #{city}
AND c.last_contact_at IS NOT NULL AND c.last_contact_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
AND c.created_at >= #{startDate}::timestamp AND c.created_at <= #{endDate}::timestamp
ORDER BY c.last_contact_at DESC NULLS LAST, c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.*, l.name AS level_name, u.real_name AS owner_name, di.item_value AS source_channel_name FROM crm_customer c INNER JOIN crm_segment_member sm ON c.id = sm.customer_id LEFT JOIN crm_customer_level l ON c.level_id = l.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.owner_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_dict_item di ON di.type_code = 'lead_source' AND di.item_code = c.source_channel AND di.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE sm.segment_id = #{segmentId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
